title: malus rivularis var. diversifolia
intro: Malus rivularis var. diversifolia, also known as the River Crab Apple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. It is a type of plant that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The River Crab Apple is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and supporting the digestive system. Traditional herbal preparations of Malus rivularis var. diversifolia include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
